channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The M4 iPad Air is powerful, but I'd recommend this Apple tablet instead
item.description: Apple’s 11-inch M3 iPad Air from last year is still a powerful tablet for the price, and this discount makes it a better buy than the current one.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for May 26, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for May 26, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for May 26, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1802 on May 26 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.
